case_title: WOO HENRY C/O RECREATION CENTER FOR THE HANDICAPPE VS LINO ZENAIDA AKA LINO ZENNIE/ SEMENES BRIDGETTE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LINO ZENAIDA AKA LINO ZENNIE/ SEMENES BRIDGETTE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY WOO HENRY C/O RECREATION CENTER FOR THE HANDICAPPE AS TO DEFENDANT LINO ZENAIDA AKA LINO ZENNIE/ SEMENES BRIDGETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOO HENRY C/O RECREATION CENTER FOR THE HANDICAPPE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINO ZENAIDA AKA LINO ZENNIE/ SEMENES BRIDGETTE $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $111.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,761.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO LINO ZENAIBA, NOT SERVED 20 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.
